//: Build-mode solution for editors and `tsc -b`: references the composite BUILD configs only (emits dist/, tests excluded). cli + mcp are bundled via tsup (not tsc -b), so they are NOT referenced here — they expose no composite build config. This is NOT the full typecheck surface — run `pnpm typecheck` (turbo type-checks every package's tsconfig.json, including tests and the bundled cli/mcp/umbrella packages).
